Variables.Name: Frequency
Variables.Description: How often to trigger the event (<= 1 means EVERY time).

Variables.Name: ParticleFrequency
Variables.Description: Only fire the first time (collision only).

Variables.Name: FirstTimeOnly
Variables.Description: Only fire the first time (collision only).

Variables.Name: LastTimeOnly
Variables.Description: Only fire the last time (collision only).

Variables.Name: UseReflectedImpactVector
Variables.Description: Use the impact FVector not the hit normal (collision only).

Variables.Name: bUseOrbitOffset
Variables.Description: Use the orbit offset when computing the position at which the event occurred.

Variables.Name: CustomName
Variables.Description: Should the event tag with a custom name? Leave blank for the default.

Variables.Name: ParticleModuleEventsToSendToGame
Variables.Description: The events we want to fire off when this event has been generated
